title: Ingestion Project
description: This view shows all files and pipeline jobs within a single ingestion project. Upload source files, monitor ETL jobs, and track each file through the full pipeline: scan → map → validate → load.
tips: Each row represents one source file and its current pipeline stage.
Click a file row to drill into job details, logs, and validation results.
Re-run failed jobs from the job detail page after fixing the underlying issue.
The 'Map to OMOP' button appears once WhiteRabbit scanning is complete.
Aqueduct ETL execution is available once mapping is approved and validation passes.
